summary_en: 1,200,000 shares (6.50% of outstanding), ¥4.2B upper limit, open-market acquisition on Tokyo Stock Exchange, May 15 – October 30, 2026. Stated purpose: shareholder returns and capital efficiency improvement, responsive capital allocation.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares (Acquisition of Treasury Shares Based on Articles of Incorporation Pursuant to Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Mars Group Holdings Corporation resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire up to 1,200,000 treasury shares (6.50% of outstanding shares as of March 31, 2026) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥4.2 billion. The acquisition will be executed through open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange during the period May 15 through October 30, 2026. The company stated the purpose as enhancing shareholder returns and capital efficiency, whilst enabling responsive capital allocation in response to changes in the operating environment. As of March 31, 2026, the company had 18,448,085 issued shares (excluding treasury shares) and held 4,271,915 treasury shares.
